summary: Frontend visual testing completed for TYRELL flower shop styling changes. All 4 requested features are working correctly: 1) Perfectly Vintages serif font applied to all text elements, 2) Gold color #daa609 visible on buttons and highlights, 3) Circular icons in Nuestra Esencia section, 4) All images loading correctly via lazy loading.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All visual styling changes verified: 1) Perfectly Vintages font from CDNFonts is applied globally via index.css and tailwind.config.js with 'Playfair Display' as fallback, 2) Gold #daa609 is used for buttons (bg-tyrell-gold) and text highlights, 3) Icons in AboutSection.js use rounded-full class creating circular containers (48x48px with borderRadius 9999px), 4) Service images load correctly via lazy loading with full URLs including .jpeg extension

perfectly_vintages_font.details: Font loaded from CDNFonts, applied to body, h1, h2, buttons, nav. Distinctive lowercase 'a' character visible confirming font is active

gold_color_daa609.details: Gold color visible on VER CATÁLOGO button (header), '+2000' badge, 'momento' text, section labels (CONÓCENOS, NUESTROS SERVICIOS)

circular_icons.details: 3 circular icon containers (48x48px, borderRadius: 9999px) in Nuestra Esencia section next to Flores Frescas, Diseño Exclusivo, Entrega Puntual

service_images.details: Images load correctly via lazy loading. Service images (Ramos, Ramos con Rosas) and About section image all displaying properly

hero_section.details: Hero displays properly with background video/image, gold text highlights, and correctly styled buttons

navigation.details: All nav links present and working: INICIO, NOSOTROS, SERVICIOS, CONTACTO, VER CATÁLOGO
